mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in nonfarm payrolls below 50k signals weak labor market conditions that depress corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS declines exceed 50k, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of GDPC1 and HOUST fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 40% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly contraction in industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals supply-side bottlenecks that increase corporate input costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns during inflationary regimes.
failure_condition: INDPRO contractions fail to correlate with negative 20d returns in > 30% of inflationary periods, or the signal's IC drops below -0.04 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI decline below 1.5% signals deflationary risks that prompt central bank intervention, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL falls below 1.5%, or the signal's IC remains below 0.02 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate above 8% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that depress consumer confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 40% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.03 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in residential construction permits above 550k signals strong housing demand that boosts related sectors, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 35% of instances where HOUST exceeds 550k, or the signal's IC falls below 0.04 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in consumer spending (RSAFS) and rising unemployment (UNRATE) indicates weakening demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days during economic downturns.
failure_condition: The joint decline of RSAFS and UNRATE fails to produce negative 60d returns in > 50% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.15).
